allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('cross-env in dev:', !!p.devDependencies['cross-env']\); console.log\('wait-on in dev:', !!p.devDependencies['wait-on']\);")

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N='MemoryMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)}}, @{N='CPU';E={$_.CPU}}, StartTime | Sort-Object MemoryMB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash(node server/scripts/create-super-admin.js radsting@pos.com Admin123 "Radsting Platform Admin")

PowerShell($pid_5000 = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($pid_5000\) { Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId = $pid_5000" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine, CreationDate | Format-List } else { "Nothing on 5000" })

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rows=sorted\(d['data'], key=lambda p:\(p['displayOrder'],p['price']\)\); [print\(f\\"  {p['code']:22s} | Rs {p['price']:>6} {p['billingCycle']:8s} | trial={p['trialDays'] or '-':>3} | featured={'Y' if p['isFeatured'] else 'N'} | {p['name']}\\"\) for p in rows]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  id={p['id']} code={p['code']:24s} name={p['name']}\\"\) for p in d['data']]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'total: {len\(d[\\"data\\"]\)}'\); [print\(f\\"  {p['code']:24s} | Rs {p['price']:>6} {p['billingCycle']:8s} | active={'Y'} | {p['name']}\\"\) for p in d['data']]")

PowerShell($ports = @\(3000, 3001, 5000, 5001\); $pids = @\(\); foreach \($p in $ports\) { $cs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $cs\) { $pids += $c.OwningProcess } }; $pids = $pids | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach \($pidn in $pids\) { $proc = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId = $pidn" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Output \("kill " + $pidn + " : " + $proc.CommandLine\) } }; foreach \($pidn in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $pidn -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "after cleanup, listeners on those ports:"; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { "  $p still in use by PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } else { "  $p free" } })

PowerShell($proc = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId = 48356" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Output $proc.CommandLine; Stop-Process -Id 48356 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { "still in use by PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } else { "5000 free" })

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./server/app.js'\).then\(m => console.log\('app loaded:', typeof m.app, '| prepareApp:', typeof m.prepareApp\)\).catch\(e => { console.error\('LOAD FAIL:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")

Bash(NODE_ENV=production MONGODB_URI=mongodb://x/db JWT_SECRET="change-me-to-a-long-random-string" node --input-type=module -e "import\('./server/config/env.js'\).then\(m=>{try{m.assertEnv\(\);console.log\('FAIL: did not throw'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('PASS blocked placeholder'\);}}\)")

Bash(NODE_ENV=production MONGODB_URI=mongodb://x/db JWT_SECRET="aB3xQ9mZ7kP2wL5nR8tY1vC4" node --input-type=module -e "import\('./server/config/env.js'\).then\(m=>console.log\(m.assertEnv\(\)?'PASS runs with warning':'FAIL'\)\)")
